Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

RULING:
PETITIONER LAURENCE ALBUKERK's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award - GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JWL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
